item.text: Using the requested ponytail style: smallest shared implementation, tests only around the required cases. I’ll first find the existing graph API and test setup so the change lands in the right place.
There is no `skills/ponytail/SKILL.md` file in the workspace, so I’m using the instructions embedded in the task. The repo is tiny: one source file and one test file.

The existing implementation already covers most behavior, but the cycle diagnostic currently reports every unresolved node. I’m tightening that to report the actual cycle members, which matters when a non-cyclic node is merely blocked by a cycle.
I’m adding one focused assertion to the cycle test so it catches the important diagnostic case: a downstream node blocked by a cycle must not be reported as part of that cycle.
The code change is in place. I’m running the TypeScript check and the test suite now.
